title: Cheaper to Marry
writer: Fanny Hatton, Frederic Hatton, Alice D.G. Miller
actors: Conrad Nagel, Lewis Stone, Paulette Duval
plot: Dick Tyler is the junior partner in the law firm of Knight and Tyler. He tries to convince his partner, Jim Tyler, than it's cheaper to be married than to continually "play the field". The main reason he's doing that is because Ji...
